route_guard_location.logic: if non-admin user is on /machine or /machine/*, router.replace('/dashboard')

criterion_2.non_admin_expected_behavior: Non-admin users cannot remain on /machine and are redirected to /dashboard.
criterion_2.caveat: Runtime auth in this environment is intermittently unstable; this update relies on current guard code plus prior runtime artifact in .sisyphus/evidence/task-15-nav-guard.txt.

learning_note: Keep route-guard checks colocated with auth bootstrap in AppShell so path-based restrictions (like /machine) stay explicit and low-risk to maintain. For API guards, verify both read (GET) and action (POST) paths with the same non-admin session to prevent asymmetric access regressions.
